scripts.dev: npx concurrently --raw -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.tunnel: npx concurrently --raw -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend -- --tunnel"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
